narration: Ever wondered how plants drink water? It’s not what you think.
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever wondered how plants drink water? It’s not what you think.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered how plants drink water? It’s not what you think.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Ever wondered how plants drink water? It’s not what you think.

narration: Capillary action is a vital process. It allows water to move through tiny channels in plants.
visual_description: Context visual: Capillary action is a vital process. It allows water to move through tiny channels in plants.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Capillary action is a vital process. It allows water to move through tiny channels in plants.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Capillary action is a vital process. It allows water to move through tiny channels in plants.

narration: But how does it work? Water molecules cling to each other and to the walls of plant tissues.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But how does it work? Water molecules cling to each other and to the walls of plant tissues.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But how does it work? Water molecules cling to each other and to the walls of plant tissues.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But how does it work? Water molecules cling to each other and to the walls of plant tissues.

narration: This creates a pull that transports water from roots to leaves, even against gravity!
visual_description: Evidence visual: This creates a pull that transports water from roots to leaves, even against gravity!
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This creates a pull that transports water from roots to leaves, even against gravity!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This creates a pull that transports water from roots to leaves, even against gravity!

narration: Without capillary action, plants would struggle to survive. Amazing, right?
